title: Two Sum
description: Find two numbers that add to target
hints: Try using a hash map to track complements.
For each number x, check if target - x was seen earlier.

title: Container With Most Water
description: Find max area between two lines
hints: Use two pointers from both ends.
Move the pointer at the shorter line to seek a larger area.

title: Coin Change
hints: Build answers bottom-up from 0 to amount.
dp[a] = min(dp[a], dp[a - coin] + 1) for each coin.

title: Number of Islands
hints: Use DFS or BFS to mark the full connected component.
